description_long: This is a male adult dressed in full military-style attire, featuring a camouflage-patterned uniform with a tactical vest and gloves. The figure has a robust build, with a prominent chest and broad shoulders, and is equipped with a utility belt and heavy-duty boots. The face is clean-shaven with a stern expression, and the hair is styled short and neatly combed back. The uniform includes multiple pockets and pouches, suggesting readiness for carrying equipment or supplies. The gloves and boots appear reinforced, suitable for rugged urban or combat environments. The overall appearance is that of a soldier or security personnel prepared for active duty in an urban setting.
description: A robust adult male in military camouflage uniform with tactical gear, gloves, and boots, exuding a prepared and authoritative presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full camouflage uniform, tactical vest, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, showing the bulk of the vest and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, belt, and the back of the boots and head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the tactical gear from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: military tactical uniform with vest, gloves, and utility belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
